snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.task: macOS-first Library Search UI and typed retrieval boundary exact-candidate review
reviewers.independence: Development froze the exact 28-path typed IPC, preload, retrieval and renderer candidate; UI Design independently accepted its exact hashes. Planning changed only existing owner, evidence, semantic and review artifacts, never the frozen Development bytes.

dimensions.summary: The Library UI and API owners now locate the complete active-vault search surface and exact typed retrieval boundary; Context Policy retains local-first retrieval authority.
Owners agree on active-vault scope, 320 Unicode code points, preload/main validation, stale-vault fences, bounded IDs/snippets/match reasons and body-free failure without scores or paths.
Three exact Library Search selectors project to existing API, Search and UI requirements/exits; semantic lock v3 has 1,217 claims and every status remains unchanged.
The H-level slice has full test, focused, scale, typecheck, build and real macOS Electron evidence; post-bind macOS package/distribution is the next complete node.
No document or decision is added; two owner updates, three selectors and semantic-neutral manifest compression keep every fixed budget green.

verification.evidence: The exact combined candidate passes docs, decisions, UI visual, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all quality dimensions.

verification.command: Exact candidate focused and macOS UI evidence
verification.evidence: Development ran 113 passed/1 skipped files and 1,298 passed/1 skipped tests, focused 111/1, 10k/100k scale, typecheck, build and real macOS Electron; UI Design accepted exact caad52cb/cb055965 identities.

verification.command: npm run verify:ui-visual && npm run verify:traceability && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The visual contract passes; semantic lock v3/1,217 and CON-001 through CON-004 pass with Requirement, Exit and Phase states unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass within the fixed entry, trace and governed Markdown budgets.

coordination.taskTitle: Library Search UI and typed retrieval boundary integration
coordination.compatibility: The candidate adds a typed active-vault retrieval.search IPC/schema/preload boundary and Library UI over existing rebuildable retrieval data; no durable schema, migration, dependency, setting, permission, provider, Job or backup/restore change.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze exact caad52cb/cb055965 bytes and UI Design accepted them. Planning bound only existing Library/API owners, acceptance evidence, semantic lock and this recipe without changing the 28 paths.

nonBlockingRisks: macOS arm64 package and downloaded-distribution evidence is the next complete H-level node because this slice changes preload build configuration.
Windows and Linux qualification remains deferred under macOS-first sequencing and is not claimed by this slice.
Tags search remains localized development/unavailable; queued Privacy, Appearance, Local Capabilities, Activity, Voice and Note Agent UI lanes are excluded.
